description: Rebound provides scam-detection products for consumers, including a browser-based anti-scam tool and an AI scam assistant. Its site focuses on scam analysis and alerts for end users and families.
summary: trustrebound.com exposes a public MCP server for the Rebound Scam Assistant at `https://trustrebound.com/api/mcp`; no public REST, GraphQL, or CLI developer surfaces were found.
